div.h1: Zero-Copy Send — Kernel DMA from User Buffer

p.strong: IORING_OP_SEND_ZC eliminates payload copy by enabling direct NIC DMA from registered user buffers

ul.li: SEND_ZC: Zero CPU usage for payload.
Constraint: Buffer is locked (pinned) until notification CQE.
Use Case: Large payloads (>4KB), high-bandwidth links (100GbE+).

div.p: [Eth][IP][TCP][ Payload Data (from User Buffer) ][FCS] |<- Kernel ->| |<---------- Zero Copy ----------->|

g.title: Indicates packet is queued to NIC
Indicates NIC has finished DMA; buffer safe to reuse
Indicates packet is queued to NIC
Indicates NIC has finished DMA; buffer safe to reuse
